title: 宝塚記念の後に・運命まで走れ！

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's just like they say, "Where there's a will, there's
a way"! Don't you agree, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, baby! The Takarazuka Kinen has just
witnessed a miracle! Matikanefukukitaru for the
wiiiin!
choice_data_list: Your fans are having a blast.
Your fans are having a blast.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right? I was practically walking on air when I
heard the cheers from the stands!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We'll just have to keep up this momentum and push through the rest of summer. Speaking of which, it's been a while since we did that, hasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's fortune slip time! Let's see where we're racing
next!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not falling back on old habits, don't worry.
Back then, I was letting luck take the wheel, but
today's different.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So, please draw a slip, Trainer. Aaaand, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Hakodate Kinen! Nice! That million-dollar
nightscape is waiting for us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Kokura Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kokura Kinen! The dwelling place of the gods
of fire! A summer down in Kyushu is sure to bring
the heat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Sapporo Kinen! I guess the snow festival
won't be happening in summer, but I'm sure we
can think up something just as festive if we win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So that decides our summer plans. But know that I
didn't just leave it up to luck, okay?
choice_data_list: Then why did you choose this way?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, this shows we can take on anything that
fate has in store for us! So let's work together to
have a blissful summer!
